_comment: Item-id tier ranges per tool category, with per-item damage ranges for the multi-swing chop loop. The catalog's `tool` field on a ResourceGroup is the minimum acceptable item_id; the per-swing damage roll is uniform over `[damage_min, damage_max]` of the player's best held item in the category. Ranges cover the Oak (base) tier — ids 1001-1008 (pickaxes) and 1051-1058 (axes) — which every resource def's minimum tool falls within. Higher wood-species tiers in the catalog (Elm, Birch, ...) are not yet wired into the damage model. See docs/game-server/RESOURCE_NODES.md §4.2 / §5.7.
